rationale: The citing paper uses Keinan and Kivetz (2008) in background discussion to support a broad claim that licensing provides short-term rewards but can hurt long-term goal attainment. The citation appears as general literature context rather than as a direct basis for the PLRM construct, hypothesis derivation, measurement approach, or study design. There is no clear borrowing or extension of the cited paper's specific hyperopia/self-control-regret mechanism.
